title: taraxacum auricula
intro: Taraxacum auricula, commonly known as the golden dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum auricula lie in its roots and leaves, which contain bitter compounds and other bioactive molecules, making it a popular ingredient in herbal medicine. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum auricula can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from mild digestive issues to more serious health conditions.
